description_long: This object is a compact, tactical shotgun with a cylindrical main body and a prominent pistol grip. The exterior is predominantly matte black, with a metallic inner barrel visible through a cutout on one side. The grip features a visible safety switch marked with 'ON' and 'OFF', and the overall design is streamlined with minimal external attachments. The front end is circular, indicating a single-barrel configuration, and the rear is closed off with no visible stock extension. The trigger area is integrated into the grip, and the object appears to be constructed primarily from metal with some polymer components.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a cylindrical body, pistol grip, and visible metallic barrel. Features a safety switch and a single-barrel design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the streamlined, cylindrical body.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the metallic inner barrel, pistol grip with safety switch, and the cutout along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed end of the cylinder and the back of the grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth, uninterrupted cylindrical surface and the grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, integrated with the grip, medium size, no finger grooves or reinforcement
